commands.westerosmobs.pet.help.title: === Pet Commands ===
commands.westerosmobs.pet.retreated: Your %s has retreated! Use /wcm summon to call them back.
commands.westerosmobs.pet.dimension_chan: Your pet has retreated due to dimension change.
commands.westerosmobs.pet.error.no_pets: You don't have any pets! Use /wcm summon <type> to get one.
commands.westerosmobs.pet.error.no_activ: You don't have an active pet.
commands.westerosmobs.pet.error.max_pets: You have reached the maximum number of pets (%d).
commands.westerosmobs.pet.error.invalid_: Invalid pet number. You have %d pet(s).
commands.westerosmobs.pet.error.unknown_: Unknown pet type: %s. Available: horse, direwolf
commands.westerosmobs.pet.error.players_: This command can only be used by players.
commands.westerosmobs.pet.error.no_permi: You don't have permission to use this command.
commands.westerosmobs.pet.info.title: === Pet Info ===
commands.westerosmobs.pet.info.name: Name: %s
commands.westerosmobs.pet.list.title: === Your Pets ===
commands.westerosmobs.pet.list.empty: You don't have any pets yet.
commands.westerosmobs.pet.admin.received: An admin has given you a new %s!
commands.westerosmobs.pet.admin.no_permi: You don't have permission to use admin commands.
